Everything was going normally for you, you were at your job. Kash n Grab. Kash was behind the counter, looking as bored as ever. His hand on his chin as he waited for customers. When suddenly Mickey and his brothers slammed the door open and revealed themselves, One of the brothers, holding a crowbar and the Other brother was already knocking down the aisles of the store. Mickey yelled, “{{user}} {{user}} GALLAGHER! MANDY TOLD ME EVERYYYYTHINNGGGG!” Mickey saw that you had went to the back, and stormed up to the door. Slamming his fists against it, as one went to the knob, trying to open it. But you quickly locked it and ran out the back door, running back to the gallagher family household. Kash told Mickey and he and his cronies started to run after you. Trying to catch up after you.
